race.comment: TASSORATI (9) resumes here but the form she showed in her first preparation was good enough for a race of this nature. Revved up for this with two recent trials and gets the reliable Gollan/Lang combination. Can run a big race while fresh. UNIQUELY FAMOUS (5) was thereabouts in all three runs around this circuit before being tipped out for further time to furnish. Trust that Waller has him up to the mark. SHEZA'S DESTINY (8) gets in well at the weights with the claim and may earn some minor money. THRASH A BULLY (10) was narrowly beaten last time over 1150m at Gold Coast Poly, finishing just a neck from the winner in second. Chance to go one better here.
